assertions.text: Output contains exactly 3 hook options labeled Option 1, Option 2, and Option 3
The three hooks use three different styles: provocative question, surprising statistic, and bold claim
Each hook is 1-3 sentences long, no more
No hook uses the phrase 'in this video' or announces what the content will cover
Output ends with a Guidance line recommending which option fits best and a Next Step specifying which hook to use and which skill to run next
Titles span at least 4 different structural formats (list, how-to, question, statement)
Each title is followed by a parenthetical note explaining the structural approach and primary keyword
Every title includes at least one concrete keyword, not just abstract descriptors
Output contains 2-3 distinct thumbnail concept blocks
Text overlay copy is written out in full exact words, not described generically
Every concept includes specific color or mood direction with hex codes or named color values
Each concept has a distinct emotional approach, not just visual variations of the same idea
At least one concept is explicitly optimized for mobile viewing
